g.text: {{term(asset)}} that is used by the manufacturing process to perform tasks.
> Note 1 to entry: An {{term(Asset)}} relies upon an {{term(Device)}} to provide {{termplural(observation)}} and information about itself and the {{term(Device)}} revises
the information to reflect changes to the {{term(Asset)}} during their interaction. Examples of {{termplural(Asset)}} are cutting tools, Part Information, Manufacturing
> Note 2 to entry: A singular {{property(Asset::assetId)}} uniquely identifies an {{term(Asset)}} throughout its lifecycle and is used to track and relate the {{term(Asset)}}
> Note 3 to entry: {{termplural(Asset)}} are temporally associated with a device and can be removed from the device without damage or alteration to its primary
{{term(engineered system)}} part of a {{term(Device)}} composed of zero or more {{termplural(Component)}}
{{term(Component)}} belonging to a {{term(Component)}} and not composed of any {{termplural(Component)}}.
{{term(observable)}} observed by a {{term(Component)}} that may make {{termplural(Observation)}}
{{term(Component)}} not belonging to any {{term(Component)}} that may have {{termplural(asset)}}
{{term(document)}} that represents a Part(s) of the MTConnect Standard.
{{term(observation)}} of either a state or discrete value of the {{term(Component)}}.
{{term(interaction model)}} for interoperability between pieces of equipment.
{{term(observation)}} that provides telemetry data for a {{term(DataItem)}}.
